# ParagonNodeDefinition.NodeTypeRaw property

Raw `eNodeType` (payload `+16`): 0=Normal/ structural/gate/rare, 3=Magic, 5=Start. This exact int is the serialized contract — kept raw deliberately; see [`NodeType`](./NodeType.md) for the named enum.
